title: [kimi-review] 3bd50d3: [SEVERITY: medium] Stack overflow risk on constrained/embedd
description:
Commit: 3bd50d339
Message: fix(coap): eliminate shared response buffer race Handlers now use per-call stack buffers. Closes project-LICHEN-cx3a

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] Stack overflow risk on constrained/embedded targets (typical for CoAP). If the buffer is sized for a full CoAP message (~1 KB+ to cover IPv6 minimum MTU or block-wise payloads) and the handler stack is small, this can overflow the stack — a bug that may only manifest under specific call depths.
